author: codex-agent

patch.value: Execute a full dogfood audit in isolated projects, validate telemetry/calendar/SDK/extension behaviors, and remediate regressions discovered in latest changes.
Full sandboxed test and coverage suites pass; telemetry and extension dogfood evidence captured; findings linked to affected items with reproducible evidence.

value.author: codex-agent

Disable telemetry pipeline in sandbox helper environments

Remote stack composition and runbook references

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Evidence sweep 2026-04-26: pnpm build succeeded; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test passed 78 files and 1048 tests in 353.97s; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage passed 78 files and 1048 tests with 100 percent thresholds in 779.25s after timeout stabilization and coverage-list alignment updates.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Dogfood matrix evidence: executed comprehensive valid command sweep in /tmp/pm-audit-dogfood-valid-CcOz3W with all command groups returning zero non-zero exit codes including init/create/update/list/search/context/calendar/deps/aggregate/dedupe/history/activity/contracts/completion/validate/health/stats/gc/test/test-all/test-runs/extensions/beads/todos and lifecycle aliases.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Telemetry evidence: local client audit in /tmp/pm-telemetry-audit-LC65Uh confirmed queue writes command_start and command_finish events with retry metadata under unreachable endpoint; config global telemetry-tracking disabled leaves queue hash unchanged; remote health endpoint https://pm-cli.unbrained.dev/healthz responded ok true queue pm.telemetry.events; synthetic POST to /v1/events returned accepted 1; https://pm.unbrained.dev returned login redirect headers.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Custom schema extension dogfood confirmed project-specific Decision and Change types can be added without core code changes via api.registerItemTypes and filtered/listed through standard commands.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Extension authoring ergonomics still require explicit ESM packaging type module for scratch extensions; capability gating correctly blocks registerCommand when commands capability is absent and surfaces activation diagnostics in extension doctor and health.
